nasb.text: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death And broke their bands apart.

esv.text: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and burst their bonds apart.

cnv.text: 他從黑暗裡和死蔭中把他們領出來， 弄斷他們的鎖鍊。

ccb.text: 祂带领他们脱离黑暗和死亡的阴影， 断开他们的锁链。

csbs.text: 他把他们从黑暗和死荫里领出来， 拉断他们的绳索。
